title: Numbered & Cleaner Hotbar
description:
Want to better locate your items in the hotbar when using the keyboard?
A Numbered Hotbar can do exactly that for you!
Also the background is cleaner for better visibility
body:
# Numbered & Cleaner Hotbar
### 📜 Description
- Simple numbered hotbar, including the "F" key in the offhand
- Cleaner hotbar background (doesn't have that noisy background texture)
### ⚠️ Compatibility
> ✅ **Vanilla 1.20.2 - 1.21.x - 26.x**
### 🗨️ Contact
> My Discord DM -> caiosm1
- ### Preview without items ⬇️
